tasks.bench:check: deno run --allow-read --allow-write --allow-env --allow-run scripts/check-benchmarks.ts --files benches/assert.bench.ts benches/context.bench.ts benches/utils.bench.ts
tasks.bench:update: deno run --allow-read --allow-write --allow-env --allow-run scripts/check-benchmarks.ts --save --files benches/assert.bench.ts benches/context.bench.ts benches/utils.bench.ts
